name: Dr. Sarah Mitchell
notes: 3-location dental practice. Primary pain: no-shows costing ~$4K/month. Very engaged, wants to expand after initial project.

name: Mark Henderson
notes: 12-person family law firm. Partners buried in email. Interested in Smart Inbox Manager + MeetingMind. Budget approved.

name: Tony Russo
notes: 25-person crew, 3 trucks. Missing 40%+ calls. Losing jobs to competitors with better online presence. High urgency.

name: Lisa Chen
notes: 8 therapists, 2 locations. Intake process is all paper. Patients arrive unprepared. Front desk overwhelmed.

name: James Whitfield
notes: Family business, 15 years. 47 Google reviews vs competitor with 200+. Sends 30 quotes/month, follows up on maybe 5.

name: Patricia Owens
notes: Inbound from LinkedIn post. 20-person accounting firm. Interested in document summarization during tax season.
